faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Inwood, Manhattan?
faqs.answer: Inwood residents most commonly encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in Inwood's older buildings, as they can cause structural damage. Our technicians are trained to identify and treat all ant species found in northern Manhattan.
